hypothesis: At least one of two fixed-seed 1,000-attempt screens returns an independently replayed exact-degree endpoint with at most five uncovered quadruples.
success_signal: best independently replayed eligible treatment endpoint has at most five uncovered quadruples; zero triggers direct all-495 cover verification
stop_signal: fewer than 20 complete returns across 2,000 attempts, or no eligible audited endpoint below six defects

ambient_space.bottleneck: generate genuine four-block exact-degree endpoints without enumerating all block quadruples

reductions_considered: warm-start stabilizer quotient (deferred: not computed or independently checked)
canonical endpoint hashing (used only to measure duplicates)
missing-quadruple targeting on the first exchange
incremental 15-quadruple and 15-pair incidence updates per changed block
memoization and learned-clause reuse (not applicable to this sampler)
chosen_mechanism: Choose a first one-point exchange whose addition covers a currently missing quadruple, then carry the +1 degree token along a directed four-cycle and score only the exact return. Require four distinct original removals, four distinct originally absent additions, no cancellation, and no proper degree-preserving subtrade.
projected_savings: At most 1,440 first exchanges and at most 36 one-point neighbors per later step replace direct traversal of 30,175,396,251 four-addition choices; this is a proposal reduction, not exhaustive coverage.
memory_design: Integer block IDs, compact JSONL traces, endpoint hashes, and incremental counters; no large candidate table.
soundness_guard: Standalone checker reconstructs all 924 blocks and 495 quadruples, replays every complete exchange, checks exact intermediate/final degrees and all proper subtrades, recomputes metrics directly, validates four negative mutations, and compares a frozen matched control.
scope_limit: A negative result applies only to these two deterministic seed streams and cannot exclude a 40-block cover.
